metadata.title: Huntly — Find Businesses Without a Website and Get Web Clients
metadata.description: Huntly scans Google Maps by niche and city to find local businesses with no website in seconds. Get their phone number, score leads and reach out via WhatsApp. Prospecting tool for freelancers and web agencies. 3 free searches.
metadata.keywords: businesses without website, find web design clients, local leads google maps, freelance web prospecting, web agency clients, businesses no website, local business leads
metadata.ogTitle: Huntly — Find Businesses With No Website in Seconds
metadata.ogDescription: Scan Google Maps by niche and city. Huntly spots businesses with no website, extracts their phone and scores them. Automated local prospecting for freelancers and web agencies.

hero.subtitle: Search by niche and city. Huntly gives you businesses with no website, their phone number, and a message ready to send.

faqs.q: Where do the results come from?
faqs.a: Huntly uses public data from local businesses and organizes it so you can spot opportunities faster.
Huntly displays phone numbers available on business listings. We always recommend reviewing the lead before reaching out.
Yes. You can use predefined niches or type in any sector you want.

faqs.q: Do I need to know how to code?
faqs.a: No. Huntly is designed for freelancers, small agencies, and creators who sell websites built with AI, WordPress, Webflow, Framer, or code.

faqs.q: What if a business already has a website?
faqs.a: Huntly prioritizes businesses without websites or with opportunity signals, but there may be cases where you need to review the lead manually.

faqs.q: Which countries and cities does Huntly work in?
faqs.a: Huntly works in any city across Spain, Mexico, Argentina, Colombia, Peru, Chile and other Spanish-speaking countries. You can search by neighborhood, area or city — from Madrid or Barcelona to Mexico City, Buenos Aires or Bogotá.

faqs.q: How does Huntly detect businesses with no website?
faqs.a: Huntly queries public Google Maps data, identifies businesses with no linked website, extracts available phone numbers and automatically assigns an opportunity score based on reviews, rating and activity signals.

faqs.q: Does Huntly guarantee I'll get clients?
faqs.a: No. Huntly helps you find businesses with opportunity signals, but closing clients depends on your offer, message, and follow-up.
